resultRows.item: TBG Total Wellness public sample PDF
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample PDF shows preview-boundary text, Vitamin B12 and Vitamin D3 nutrient pages, visible SNP/RSID/result/effect tables, gene definitions, lab-range cards, food blocks, supplement blocks, sunlight text, and probiotic text for output-format parity.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: These rows document the Sequencing.com/Toolbox Genomics preview format only. They must not be treated as this local fixture's vitamin status, diet, workout, supplement, lab, symptom, metabolic, diagnosis, child-specific, or treatment conclusions.

sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample opens with a Nourish Nutrition Optimization Plan cover, Sample1 identity, May 2018 date, and a repeated note that only a limited number of preview pages are displayed.
sampleRows.description: Use this as observed report identity and preview-boundary structure only; it does not prove full-report section coverage.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Nourish sample PDF cover and preview footer; this is observed report structure, not a local nutrition conclusion.

sampleRows.item: Vitamin B12 health information and gene table
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin B12 page says people with similar genetic markers may be predisposed to low vitamin B12 levels and shows a gene table with CUBN rs1801222 GG non-variant, TCN1 rs526934 AA non-variant, FUT2 rs602662 GG variant, FUT2 rs601338 GG non-variant, and FUT2 rs1047781 AA non-variant.
sampleRows.description: The page includes condition-definition text and CUBN, TCN1, and FUT2 gene definitions.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 13 of the public Nourish sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure and not a local vitamin B12 status, deficiency, diet, lab, or supplement conclusion.

sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin B12 action page shows Vitamin B12-rich food, Vitamin B12 lab-range, Methylmalonic Acid lab-range, Vitamin B12 supplement, and pro-tip blocks.
sampleRows.description: The sample includes food examples, typical lab ranges, a supplement starting-dose statement, and supplement-form text as observed preview content.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 14 of the public Nourish sample PDF; do not turn sample food, lab, dose, or supplement-form text into local advice.

sampleRows.item: Vitamin D3 health information and gene table
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin D3 page says people with similar genetic markers may be predisposed to low vitamin D3 levels and shows a gene table with CYP2R1 rs10741657 AA non-variant, GC rs2282679 TT non-variant, GC rs4588 GG non-variant, and DHCR7 rs12785878 TT variant.
sampleRows.description: The page includes condition-definition text and CYP2R1, GC, and DHCR7 gene definitions.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 17 of the public Nourish sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure and not local vitamin D status, sun exposure, lab, supplement, or treatment advice.

sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin D3 action page shows Sunlight, Vitamin D supplement, Vitamin D3 (25-OH) lab-range, and Probiotics blocks.
sampleRows.description: The sample includes sun-exposure text, a supplement amount, lab-range text, and probiotic text as observed preview content.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 18 of the public Nourish sample PDF; do not turn sample sunlight, supplement, lab, probiotic, or dose text into local advice.
